recurring_credits.name: Hotel Booking Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $250/half ($500/year cap) on hotel bookings via Robinhood Travel portal. Luxury hotels eligible for full $250; standard hotels capped at $100. 2-night minimum.

recurring_credits.name: Autonomous Ride Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $20/month statement credit for autonomous ride purchases ($30 in December). $250/year total.

recurring_credits.name: Dining Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $20/month statement credit at 15,000+ participating restaurants ($30 in December). $250/year total.

recurring_credits.name: DoorDash Credit
recurring_credits.description: Two $10 DoorDash discounts each month (three $10 in January). Discounts apply to delivery orders $50+. $250/year total.

recurring_credits.name: Health Wearables Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $200/year on eligible health wearables purchases.

recurring_credits.name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $120 statement credit for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck application fee, every 4 years.
